scripts.postinstall: cd packages/database && AWS_ROLE_ARN=${AWS_ROLE_ARN:-arn:aws:iam::000000000000:role/placeholder} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} PGHOST=${PGHOST:-localhost} PGPORT=${PGPORT:-5432} PGUSER=${PGUSER:-postgres} PGDATABASE=${PGDATABASE:-app} npx prisma generate --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.predev: for f in apps/app apps/api apps/web apps/mcp apps/relay; do test -f $f/.env.local || cp $f/.env.example $f/.env.local 2>/dev/null; done; test -f packages/database/.env || cp packages/database/.env.example packages/database/.env 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.desktop:no-auth:start: cd apps/desktop && CL_LOCAL_GATEWAY_NO_AUTH=1 pnpm run start
scripts.desktop:debug-auth: cd apps/desktop && CL_LOCAL_GATEWAY_DEBUG_AUTH=1 pnpm run dev
scripts.desktop:no-auth: cd apps/desktop && CL_LOCAL_GATEWAY_NO_AUTH=1 pnpm run dev:static
scripts.desktop:prod-origins: cd apps/desktop && CL_LOCAL_GATEWAY_PROD_ORIGINS_ONLY=1 pnpm run dev
scripts.migrate: cd packages/database && pnpm prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:status: cd packages/database && pnpm prisma migrate status
